member.name: P:PluginRegistration.Core.Config.PluginRegistrationConfig.Profiles
member.summary: Per-environment overrides keyed by profile name (dev, test, prod).

member.name: P:PluginRegistration.Core.Config.ProfileSettings.StepOverrides
member.summary: Step overrides keyed by step name or step Id (GUID).

member.name: P:PluginRegistration.Core.Config.ProfileSettings.CustomApis
member.summary: Custom API definitions for this environment.

member.name: M:PluginRegistration.Core.Connection.DataverseConnectionFactory.BuildConnectionStringFromEnvironment
member.summary: Builds a connection string from environment variables. Supports both classic secrets and certificates. Also supports Azure DevOps Service Connection variables (AZURE_*).

member.name: T:PluginRegistration.Core.EarlyBound.EarlyBoundGeneratorService
member.summary: Generates early-bound Dataverse types using DLaB Early Bound Generator V2 (PAC ModelBuilder).

member.name: T:PluginRegistration.Core.EarlyBound.FlexibleStringListJsonConverter
member.summary: Accepts JSON string ("account"), pipe-separated string ("account|contact"), or string array.

member.name: T:PluginRegistration.Core.Registration.CustomApiRegistrationService
member.summary: Creates and maintains Custom API definitions, request parameters, response properties, and plugin type bindings based on code attributes.

member.name: M:PluginRegistration.Core.Sync.CodeParser.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Legacy constructor using regex-only detection (supports --class-regex override).

member.name: T:PluginRegistration.Core.Sync.MetadataSyncService
member.summary: Downloads plugin step metadata from Dataverse and writes CrmPluginRegistration attributes into source code.

member.name: T:PluginRegistration.Core.Sync.SourceCodeTypeIndex
member.summary: Indexes class inheritance across all source files to detect plugins inheriting from custom base classes.
